title: The pathology of food and pasture legumes
abstract: The book comprises 14 critical reviews by different authors on disease as a constraint to production of legumes, diseases of groundnut, soybean, common bean (phaseolus vulgaris), cowpea,pea, faba bean, lentil, chickpea, pigeon pea, lupins, clover and tropical pasture legumes, and improved understanding and management of legume diseases. Vernacular and scientific names of some legumes crops are listed. The symptoms are illustrated. A subject index is appended
